steps.title: Identify the negation and correction
steps.content: The first sentence says metals do NOT maintain bonds by sharing/exchanging electrons. The second sentence must explain what actually happens instead. The transition word must signal this shift—it needs to mean “instead” or “rather.”

steps.title: Match the corrective transition
steps.content: ”Rather” means “instead,” perfectly shifting from negation to truth. The other choices fail: “For example” continues with the negated mechanism; “Accordingly” implies consequence; “Likewise” implies similarity. That matches choice B — B is correct.
